source_content:
metadata:
  name: stackit-k8s-reusable-blueprint
  version: 1.6.0
spec:
  repository:
    repo_mode: template-source
    description: Platform blueprint template
    required_files:
      - README.md
      - Makefile
      - .pre-commit-config.yaml
    consumer_init:
      source_artifact_prune_globs_on_init:
        - specs/[0-9][0-9][0-9][0-9]-[0-9][0-9]-[0-9][0-9]-*
        - docs/blueprint/architecture/decisions/ADR-*.md
target_content:

spec:

    repo_mode: generated-consumer
    description: DHE Marketplace consumer
    required_files:
      - README.md
      - Makefile
      - .pre-commit-config.yaml
      - docs/consumer-guide.md
      - docs/consumer-api-deleted.md
    consumer_init:
      source_artifact_prune_globs_on_init:
        - specs/[0-9][0-9][0-9][0-9]-[0-9][0-9]-[0-9][0-9]-*
        - docs/blueprint/architecture/decisions/ADR-*.md
        - internal-consumer-artifacts/**
